title: Built for many entities
text: Native sub-accounts map one-to-one to each clinic's own Xero or NetSuite file. Groups running 3 to 16+ separate files don't have to force a consolidation they're not ready for.

title: Cards issued and cancelled instantly
text: Issue or cancel a card from a phone or laptop in seconds — no credit checks, no branch visits, no waiting on a manual bank process.

title: Leave cover in one click
text: Drop a departing or on-leave staff member's limit to zero and hand their exact rules, coding and budget to a covering colleague instantly. No card-sharing, no shared credentials.

title: Receipts that chase themselves
text: Cards lock automatically after a set number of days without a receipt, and unlock the moment one lands. Compliance stops being something finance has to nag for.

title: Every dollar has a name
text: Individual attribution on every card and every transaction. No more shared-card transactions nobody can trace back to a person or a site.

title: Approvals with real teeth
text: Pre-spend limits and merchant restrictions on cards, plus genuine dollar-threshold multi-level sign-off on reimbursements and AP — not one person rubber-stamping after the money's already gone.

title: One clean feed per entity
text: Every card and budget in an entity rolls into a single pre-coded, pre-matched bank-feed-style sync into Xero or NetSuite. No manually reconciling hundreds of cards one by one.

title: One platform, not four
text: Cards, reimbursements, subscriptions and accounts payable all in one place — so the group isn't juggling three or four separate apps to cover different spend types.

title: Local, and it shows
text: Australian-founded, Australian-based, ex-Westpac founders, ISO/SOC certified, Australian data residency — plus FX around 0.95% versus a typical bank's 2-3% for any staff who travel.
